creator: pauls@utdallas.edu
text:
Whoever committed the port placed the patch file that I submitted
	in the ${FILESDIR}.  The patch was *supposed* to be applied to the
	sguild.sh.in file in the ${FILESDIR} *not* placed in the ${FILEDIR}.
	As a result, the patch fails and the port will not install or update.

Fix: 

Apply the patch-sguild.sh.in patch to the existing sguild.sh.in file
	in the ${FILESDIR} before committing the port.
